name: 8eec5762-9a33-49de-8496-b28dc129d9b9

functionParameter.reflective_question: What is one tiny action you can take today?

agentUtterance.text: Let's look at The First Step. What is one tiny action you can take today?

userUtterance.text: I actually already did it! I cleaned off my entire desk this morning and it feels so much better to work here.

functionParameter.note_text: Cleaned off entire desk and felt much better working there.

functionParameter.status: Success: Growth note added to Evidence List.

agentUtterance.text: That is a fantastic win to start the day with! I've added that clean desk to your Evidence List and marked this module complete. Would you like to check your to-do list, or is there anything else you'd like to do?

playbookInput.precedingConversationSummary: The user has gone through their daily check-in and is now working through Track 1, Phase 1, Module 3 of Able Pathways.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: Customer cleaned their desk and agent marked the module complete.

description: Teach the AI to trigger the log_growth_note tool alongside the completion tool when the user shares a win.
